heading: Compound Wildcard Search and Sort Example
body:
**Input:**

```json
[
  {
    $search: {
      "compound": {
        "should": [{
          "wildcard": {
            "query": ["Prance*"],
            "path": "title",
            "allowAnalyzedField": true
          }
        },
        {
          "wildcard": {
            "query": ["Prince*"],
            "path": "title",
            "allowAnalyzedField": true
          }
        }]
      },
      "sort": {
        "title": 1
      }
    }
  }
]
```

**Output:**

```

  plot: "A farm girl nurses a wounded reindeer she believes is one of Santa's, …"
```

The Search Tester might not display all the fields in the
documents it returns. To view all the fields, including the field that
you specify in the query path, expand the document in
the results.
